title: Towering Isles
description: A small modpack, mostly for personal use, built around dramatic world generation and exploration.
body:
A small modpack, mostly for personal use. 

The focus is mostly on exploration, with a custom world gen based on the Stratospherical preset from [Ecospherical Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecospherical-expansion). Featuring lots to explore, some tougher bosses and cool weapons, as well as some meaty content mods like Create and Immersive Engineering, and spice mods like the Let's Do series.

Navigate the fog-shrouded oceans and towering cliff faces in a Valkyrien Skies 2 ship, or go out on a short escapade with Immersive Aircraft or Small Ships. Face down dungeons and bosses, find new weapons and boons, and most importantly, return with a story to tell.

Looking for a bit of immersive fun? Forego text chat and screenshots entirely, and communicate with your fellow adventurers via Simple Voice Chat for proximity voice. Getting further away? Use Simple Radio to keep in touch over longer distances. Make sure to bring back an Exposure film reel to develop together and show your friends what you've found!

Uses a custom-configured Complementary Shaders with Euphoria Patches for a unique atmosphere with minimal performance loss, as well as hand-picked and tweaked resource packs including [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) and Biome Berries to add a bit of unfamiliar spice to the experience.
